introduction: SYNOPSISNa-young and Myung-ho live a happy family life with their daughter, Cho-rong. They were to spend their vacation in a condominium but Myung-ho is unable to come due to some urgent business. Na-young is raped by Sang-hyun that night. Sang-hyun violated Na-young in vengeance because her eyes resembled his old girlfriend's. However, Na-young's sexual desires make her want Sang-hyun. Meanwhile, Myung-ho has an affair with Cho-rong's piano teacher who gets pregnant. When Na-young finds out, out of guilt, she decides to divorce Myung-ho and chooses Sang-hyun. But Myung-ho begs for her forgiveness and Cho-rong asks her mother to stay in tears. Through Cho-rong's appeals, the two forgive each other and they put an end to their long wandering.
